name: Hassane El-Khoury
background: Hassane El-Khoury has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since December 2020. Prior to joining the Company, Mr. El-Khoury served as President, Chief Executive Officer and a member of the board of directors of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation from August 2016 until its sale to Infineon Technologies AG in April 2020.
